note: Sellable AI critical-IT MW + unit economics for the neocloud / ex-BTC-miner cohort. Canonical source for neocloud-capacity-tracker.{md,html}. op/con/plan = verify-adjusted critical-IT AI MW. cap/nd/bk in $B. Derived analytics (EV, weighted MW, EV/MW, coverage, %energized) are computed at render time, not stored. dupe!=null => excluded from de-duped cohort totals.

geo_note: Campus-level site map, added 2026-07-09. lat/lng are town/county centroids, NOT parcel coordinates. approx=true => only the state/country is public (placed at a state-level position; dashed on the map). Sites with undisclosed locations or n/d MW live in geo_unmapped. DOCN (leased colo, locations undisclosed) and AKAM (distributed edge PoPs) are excluded by construction.
